data.name: ConfirmRecycleBinDontAskAgain
data.value: Don't ask again for Recycle Bin deletes

data.name: ConfirmRecycleBinDontAskAgainAutomationName
data.value: Do not ask again for Recycle Bin deletes

data.name: ConfirmRecycleBinDontAskAgainHelpText
data.value: When checked, future Delete actions move images to the Recycle Bin without this confirmation. You can turn confirmation back on in Settings.

data.name: ConfirmRecycleBinFootnote
data.value: You can restore the file from the Recycle Bin until it is emptied.

data.name: ConfirmRecycleBinMessage
data.value: This keeps the file recoverable, but removes it from the current folder and advances the viewer.

data.name: ConfirmReferenceBoardDetail
data.value: Images and notes are removed from the canvas only. Source files are not changed.

data.name: ConfirmReferenceBoardMessage
data.value: This removes the current board layout from this window. Export first if you need to keep a copy.

data.name: CrashDetailsCopied
data.value: Copied crash details to the clipboard.

data.name: CrashDetailsDescription
data.value: Full details are written to the crash log. Use the buttons below to copy a shareable summary, open the log folder, or open a GitHub issue with the context pre-filled.

data.name: CrashIssueBrowserAndCopyFailed
data.value: Could not open the browser or copy the issue URL.

data.name: CrashIssueBrowserFailedCopied
data.value: Could not open the browser. The issue URL was copied to the clipboard.

data.name: CrashIssueTruncatedMarker
data.value: ...truncated - see crash log for full details...

data.name: CrashLogFolderOpenFailedFormat
data.value: Could not open the log folder: {0}

data.name: LogFolderUnavailable
data.value: The log folder is not available yet.

data.name: ClipboardBusyRetry
data.value: Clipboard is busy. Try again in a moment.

data.name: ResizeDescription
data.value: Add a non-destructive resize operation to edit history.

data.name: ResizeModeLongEdgeDescription
data.value: Set the longest side and preserve the source ratio.

data.name: ResizeModePercentDescription
data.value: Scale both dimensions by a percentage.

data.name: ResizeModeShortEdgeDescription
data.value: Set the shortest side and preserve the source ratio.

data.name: ResizeOpenValidImageError
data.value: Open an image with valid pixel dimensions before resizing.

data.name: ResizeOutputMinimumError
data.value: Resize output must be at least 1 x 1 pixels.

data.name: ResizeOutputTooLargeFormat
data.value: Resize output cannot exceed {0} pixels on either edge.

data.name: ResizePreviewNote
data.value: This records an edit operation only. Use Save a copy to export pixels with the resize applied.

data.name: ResizeReadyStatus
data.value: Ready to add this resize to edit history.

data.name: PerspectiveApplyToEditHistory
data.value: Apply perspective correction to edit history

data.name: PerspectiveDescription
data.value: Drag the four source corners, then add a perspective correction edit.

data.name: PerspectiveDragCornerStatus
data.value: Drag a corner handle or use a keystone nudge.

data.name: PerspectiveMoveCornerBeforeApplying
data.value: Move at least one corner before applying.

data.name: PerspectivePreviewNote
data.value: This records an edit operation only. Use Save a copy to export pixels with the perspective correction applied.

data.name: PerspectiveReadyStatusFormat
data.value: Perspective ready. Output will be {0} x {1} px.

data.name: PerspectiveUnavailableMissingFile
data.value: Perspective unavailable: image file is no longer available.

data.name: EditHistoryDescription
data.value: Inspect sidecar edits, fork virtual copies, and export with provenance.

data.name: EditHistoryInitialStatus
data.value: Open an image to inspect its edit history.

data.name: EditNoOperationsYet
data.value: No edit operations yet. Crop, selection, and adjustment tools will add operations here instead of changing the source file.

data.name: EditNoSidecarYet
data.value: No sidecar exists yet. Future edits will create one.

data.name: EditOperationEnabledExportFormat
data.value: {0} enabled operation{1} will apply when this copy is exported.

data.name: EditOpenImageBeforeChanging
data.value: Open an image before changing edit history.

data.name: EditOpenImageBeforeUsing
data.value: Open an image before using edit history.

data.name: EditSidecarNotWritten
data.value: Sidecar has not been written yet.

data.name: EditToggleSelectedAutomationName
data.value: Enable or disable selected edit operation

data.name: SidecarDisabledOperationNote
data.value: Disabled operations remain in history but are skipped on export.

data.name: AnnotationApplyMissingItem
data.value: Add at least one annotation before applying.

data.name: AnnotationArrowToolStatus
data.value: Arrow: drag from tail to point.

data.name: AnnotationBlurToolStatus
data.value: Blur: drag over a region to redact with blur.

data.name: AnnotationDescription
data.value: Draw markup or redaction regions, then add them to the edit history.

data.name: AnnotationPenToolStatus
data.value: Pen: drag to draw a freehand line.

data.name: AnnotationPixelateToolStatus
data.value: Pixelate: drag over a region to redact with blocks.

data.name: AnnotationReadyStatusFormat
data.value: {0} annotation{1} ready. Press Enter to apply.

data.name: AnnotationStepToolStatus
data.value: Step: click once to place the next numbered callout.

data.name: AnnotationTextToolStatus
data.value: Text: click once to place the current text.

data.name: AnnotationUnavailableMissingFile
data.value: Preview unavailable: image file is no longer available.

data.name: ImageAutomationHelpText
data.value: Use arrow keys to navigate previous / next in folder. Mouse wheel zooms; drag pans; double-click fits. F1 shortcut help.

data.name: OcrTextBoxHelpText
data.value: Selectable OCR text. Drag to highlight text, then press Ctrl+C or use the context menu to copy.

data.name: OcrTextRegionsHelpText
data.value: Select text inside a region, then copy it with Ctrl+C or the text box context menu

data.name: EffectsChooseBeforeApplying
data.value: Choose a preset or move a slider before applying.

data.name: EffectsChoosePresetOrSlider
data.value: Choose a preset or move a slider to preview effects.

data.name: EffectsEditNotice
data.value: This records an edit operation only. Use Save a copy to export pixels with the effects applied.

data.name: EffectsPreviewReadyEnter
data.value: Preview ready. Press Enter to apply.

data.name: EffectsPreviewUnavailableMissingFile
data.value: Preview unavailable: image file is no longer available.

data.name: EffectsSubtitle
data.value: Preview sharpen, noise reduction, and vignette before adding an edit.

data.name: AdjustmentsSubtitle
data.value: Preview levels, curve, and HSL before adding an edit.

data.name: AdjustmentsCurveHint
data.value: Negative softens contrast; positive adds contrast.

data.name: AdjustmentsEditNotice
data.value: This records an edit operation only. Use Save a copy to export pixels with the adjustment applied.

data.name: AdjustmentsPreviewUnavailableMissingFile
data.value: Preview unavailable: image file is no longer available.

data.name: AdjustmentsMoveSliderToPreview
data.value: Move a slider to preview an adjustment.

data.name: AdjustmentsPreviewReadyEnter
data.value: Preview ready. Press Enter to apply.

data.name: ModelManagerSubtitle
data.value: Approved local model files stay under app data. Downloads are manual and SHA-256 verified before future AI tools can use them.

data.name: ModelManagerNoModelSelectedSubtitle
data.value: Select an approved model to inspect its source, hash, local status, and import requirements.

data.name: ModelManagerSecurityNotice
data.value: Images never downloads models automatically. Import only model files you chose from an approved source; mismatched hashes stay disabled.

data.name: ModelManagerSelectBeforeImporting
data.value: Select an approved model before importing.

data.name: ModelManagerSelectBeforeDeleting
data.value: Select a model before deleting local files.

data.name: RecoveryCenterSubtitle
data.value: Review recent moves, quarantines, writebacks, and Recycle Bin actions recorded locally.

data.name: RecoveryCenterEmptyDescription
data.value: Destructive moves, quarantines, writebacks, and Recycle Bin sends will appear here after they are recorded.

data.name: RecoveryCenterNoRevealPath
data.value: No existing path or parent folder is available for this record.

data.name: RecoveryCenterSelectRestorableFirst
data.value: Select a restorable recovery record first.

data.name: BatchSubtitle
data.value: Preview resize/convert settings, save presets, and export collision-safe copies.

data.name: BatchOperationsHint
data.value: Build an ordered copy pipeline. Operations run top to bottom and write a new file.

data.name: BatchOutputFolderDefault
data.value: Output folder: Images batch output beside each source

data.name: BatchPreviewHint
data.value: Build a preview to see output paths and dimensions.

data.name: BatchDryRunHint
data.value: Dry run is on by default. Turn it off when the preview looks correct.

data.name: BatchReadyStatus
data.value: Ready. Add files or a folder to begin.

data.name: BatchCouldNotAddSource
data.value: Could not add that batch source.

data.name: BatchSettingsChanged
data.value: Settings changed. Build a new preview before running.

data.name: BatchAddSourcesBeforeRunning
data.value: Add supported source files before running a batch.

data.name: BatchAddSourcesBeforePreview
data.value: Add supported source files before building a preview.

data.name: BatchPresetReady
data.value: Preset ready. Build a preview to inspect output paths and dimensions.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupSubtitle
data.value: Local scan for exact duplicates and visually similar images. Nothing leaves this device.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupReferenceTooltip
data.value: Add a folder whose files should be preferred as keep candidates

data.name: DuplicateCleanupReferenceFoldersHint
data.value: Files in these folders are sorted first so cleanup actions keep them by default.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupThresholdHint
data.value: Lower values are stricter. Exact duplicates are always included.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupEmptyStateDescription
data.value: Images will group byte-identical files and visually similar images. Review side by side before moving extras to quarantine or the Recycle Bin.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupCompareAutomationName
data.value: Compare selected duplicate pair in viewer

data.name: DuplicateCleanupRecycleExtrasAutomationName
data.value: Move extra duplicate candidates to Recycle Bin

data.name: DuplicateCleanupHelpText
data.value: Cleanup actions target every candidate after the first one shown here.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupReadyStatus
data.value: Ready. Add one or more folders to scan.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupAddFolderBeforeScanning
data.value: Add at least one folder before scanning.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupScanningStatus
data.value: Scanning folders for exact duplicates and similar images...

data.name: DuplicateCleanupScanFailedSuffixFormat
data.value: {0} file or folder issue{1} was skipped.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupScanResultFormat
data.value: Scanned {0} file{1}. Found {2} exact group{3} and {4} similar pair{5}.{6}

data.name: DuplicateCleanupThresholdChanged
data.value: Threshold changed. Scan again to recompute similar-image findings.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupMarkedNotDuplicate
data.value: Finding marked not duplicate for this session.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupSelectFindingBeforeComparing
data.value: Select a duplicate or similar-image finding before comparing.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupCompareFileUnavailable
data.value: One of the selected compare files is no longer available.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupOpenedCompare
data.value: Opened selected pair in viewer compare mode.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupNoExtrasToQuarantine
data.value: No extra files are available to quarantine.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupQuarantineRecoveryDetailFormat
data.value: Moved duplicate candidate {0} to app-local quarantine batch {1}.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupQuarantineUnavailable
data.value: Quarantine storage is not available. No files were moved.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupNoExtrasToRecycle
data.value: No extra files are available to recycle.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupRecycleRecoveryDetailFormat
data.value: Sent duplicate candidate {0} to the Windows Recycle Bin.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupRecyclePartialFormat
data.value: Moved {0} file{1} to the Recycle Bin. {2} failed or was already missing.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupRecycleSuccessFormat
data.value: Moved {0} file{1} to the Recycle Bin.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupHelpTextSingleExtra
data.value: Cleanup actions target the extra candidate on the right.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupHelpTextMultipleExtrasFormat
data.value: Cleanup actions target {0} extra candidates after the keep candidate.

data.name: SettingsLanguageDescription
data.value: Choose the display language for menus and labels.

data.name: SettingsLanguageRestartNotice
data.value: Language changed. Restart Images to apply everywhere.

data.name: SettingsRememberWindowDescription
data.value: Restores the last normal window bounds unless Images was launched in peek mode.

data.name: SettingsRestoreSessionDescription
data.value: When Images starts with no file, reopens the last image you viewed. If that file is gone, opens to the empty state.

data.name: SettingsColorManagementDescription
data.value: Honors an image's embedded ICC profile and converts wide-gamut colors (Adobe RGB, Display P3) to sRGB so they no longer look over-saturated. Applies to the current and newly opened images; decodes through Magick.NET.

data.name: SettingsThemeDescription
data.value: Choose a dark or light workspace, or follow your Windows preference. Changes apply immediately.

data.name: SettingsLoupeMagnificationDescription
data.value: How much the middle-button loupe magnifies the pixels under the cursor.

data.name: SettingsFilmstripDescription
data.value: Displays folder thumbnails below the viewer when a folder is opened.

data.name: SettingsMetadataHudDescription
data.value: Floats camera, exposure, and location data over the image.

data.name: SettingsConfirmRecycleBinTitle
data.value: Confirm before moving images to Recycle Bin

data.name: SettingsConfirmRecycleBinDescription
data.value: Turn this back on if you used 'don't ask again' on the delete confirmation.

data.name: SettingsSiblingFolderDescription
data.value: When reaching the last or first image in a folder, continue into the next or previous sibling folder instead of wrapping.

data.name: SettingsSiblingFolderOnStatus
data.value: Sibling folder auto-switch enabled. Navigation continues into adjacent folders.

data.name: SettingsSiblingFolderOffStatus
data.value: Sibling folder auto-switch disabled. Navigation wraps within the current folder.

data.name: SettingsStopAtEndsTitle
data.value: Stop at first and last image

data.name: SettingsStopAtEndsDescription
data.value: Prev/Next stop at the ends of the folder with a brief nudge instead of wrapping around. Takes precedence over sibling folder auto-switch.

data.name: SettingsStopAtEndsOnStatus
data.value: Navigation will stop at the first and last image.

data.name: SettingsStopAtEndsOffStatus
data.value: Navigation will wrap or switch folders at the ends.

data.name: SettingsReduceMotionDescription
data.value: Reduces nonessential fades, pulses, and transform animations throughout the viewer.

data.name: SettingsHighContrastDescription
data.value: Uses stronger system-derived colors and borders throughout the app.

data.name: SettingsArchiveRtlDescription
data.value: Uses manga-style page turn direction for supported archive books.

data.name: SettingsArchiveCleanScanDescription
data.value: Applies the preview-only old-scan filter when opening archive books.

data.name: SettingsArchiveSpreadTitle
data.value: Open archive books in two-page spreads

data.name: SettingsArchiveSpreadDescription
data.value: Keeps explicit covers single and pairs interior pages where possible.

data.name: SettingsHotkeysDescription
data.value: Edit supported shortcuts with names such as Ctrl+O, Ctrl+Shift+B, F5, Del, or C.

data.name: SettingsHotkeySummaryDefaultFormat
data.value: All {0} editable shortcuts are using their defaults.

data.name: SettingsHotkeyShortcutHelp
data.value: Enter a shortcut such as Ctrl+O, Ctrl+Shift+B, F5, Del, or C, then choose Apply.

data.name: SettingsOcrPrivacyNote
data.value: OCR is local to Windows. Images does not upload image data for text extraction.

data.name: SettingsRememberWindowOnStatus
data.value: Window size and position will be restored at startup.

data.name: SettingsRememberWindowOffStatus
data.value: Images will use its default window placement at startup.

data.name: SettingsRestoreSessionOnStatus
data.value: Images will reopen the last image when launched with no file.

data.name: SettingsRestoreSessionOffStatus
data.value: Images will start at the empty state when launched with no file.

data.name: SettingsColorManagementOnStatus
data.value: Embedded color profiles will be converted to sRGB on newly opened images.

data.name: SettingsColorManagementOffStatus
data.value: Images will display raw pixel values without ICC color conversion.

data.name: SettingsFilmstripOnStatus
data.value: Filmstrip will be shown at startup.

data.name: SettingsFilmstripOffStatus
data.value: Filmstrip will stay hidden at startup.

data.name: SettingsMetadataHudOnStatus
data.value: Metadata overlay will be shown at startup.

data.name: SettingsMetadataHudOffStatus
data.value: Metadata overlay will stay hidden at startup.

data.name: SettingsRecycleBinConfirmOffStatus
data.value: Recycle Bin confirmation disabled. Delete will move images immediately.

data.name: SettingsReduceMotionOnStatus
data.value: Motion reduction enabled for viewer chrome animations.

data.name: SettingsArchiveRtlOnStatus
data.value: Archive books will use right-to-left page turns.

data.name: SettingsArchiveRtlOffStatus
data.value: Archive books will use left-to-right page turns.

data.name: SettingsArchiveCleanScanOnStatus
data.value: Archive clean-scan preview filter enabled by default.

data.name: SettingsArchiveCleanScanOffStatus
data.value: Archive clean-scan preview filter disabled by default.

data.name: SettingsArchiveSpreadOnStatus
data.value: Archive two-page spreads enabled by default.

data.name: SettingsArchiveSpreadOffStatus
data.value: Archive two-page spreads disabled by default.

data.name: SettingsUpdateCheckOnStatus
data.value: Automatic update checks enabled. Images only contacts GitHub Releases.

data.name: SettingsUpdateCheckDescription
data.value: Off by default. When enabled, Images pings github.com/SysAdminDoc/Images at startup. No usage data is sent.

data.name: SettingsHotkeySummary
data.value: Ctrl+, Settings; Ctrl+Shift+B Batch; Ctrl+Shift+D Duplicate cleanup; Ctrl+Shift+H File health; Ctrl+Shift+E Edit history; Ctrl+Alt+A Adjustments; Ctrl+Alt+F Effects; Ctrl+Alt+P Perspective; C Crop; S Selection.

data.name: SettingsHotkeyInvalidFormat
data.value: Shortcut for {0} is not valid. Use forms such as Ctrl+O, Ctrl+Shift+B, F5, Del, or C.

data.name: SettingsHotkeyConflictFormat
data.value: {0} already uses {1}. Choose a different shortcut first.

data.name: SettingsDiagnosticsStorageSummary
data.value: Diagnostics and support files stay under the local Images app data folder. Use About for the full codec report, system info, logs, and cache controls.

data.name: SettingsLanguageSettingsFailedFormat
data.value: Could not open Windows language settings: {0}

data.name: SettingsStorageUnavailableStatus
data.value: Storage path is unavailable in this session.

data.name: AboutDescription
data.value: Premium local-first image viewer with a focused, image-first workspace

data.name: AboutUpdateCheckTooltip
data.value: Off by default. When enabled, Images checks GitHub Releases at startup.

data.name: AboutUpdateCheckHelpText
data.value: Off by default. When enabled, Images checks GitHub Releases at startup. No image, file, or folder metadata is sent.

data.name: AboutSaveSystemInfoAutomationName
data.value: Save system info to a text file

data.name: AboutSaveSystemInfoTooltip
data.value: Writes Images --system-info output to a text file in your temp folder and reveals it in Explorer.

data.name: AboutOpenDataFolderTooltip
data.value: Opens %LOCALAPPDATA%\Images — logs, settings.db, thumbs, update-check.json all live here.

data.name: AboutClearThumbnailCachePromptFormat
data.value: Clear {0} cached thumbnails and {1} temporary files? Images will rebuild thumbnails from the original files when folders are viewed again.

data.name: AboutThumbnailCacheClearedPartialFormat
data.value: Cleared {0} files ({1}). {2} files could not be removed because they may be in use.

data.name: AboutThumbnailCacheClearedFormat
data.value: Cleared {0} thumbnail files ({1}). Thumbnails will rebuild automatically.

data.name: MacroSubtitle
data.value: Build inspectable JSON actions, preview them, then run them against local files.

data.name: MacroReadyStatus
data.value: Ready. Inspect the JSON before running actions.

data.name: MacroCouldNotAddSource
data.value: Could not add that macro source.

data.name: MacroAddSourcesBeforeRunning
data.value: Add supported source files before running a macro.

data.name: MacroPlanSummaryFormat
data.value: {0}: {1} action{2}. JSON remains editable before running.

data.name: MacroAddStepsFirst
data.value: Add at least one pipeline step before running.

data.name: ImportInboxSubtitle
data.value: Stage new images, resolve duplicates, add sidecar tags and ratings, then import locally.

data.name: ImportInboxDuplicateCheckHint
data.value: Duplicate checks compare staged files against this folder recursively.

data.name: ImportInboxNoFileSelectedHint
data.value: Add files or folders, then select an item to tag, rate, strip GPS, or skip.

data.name: ImportInboxTagsHint
data.value: Tags are written to XMP sidecars. Aliases and parents from Tag relationships are applied on import.

data.name: ImportInboxStripGps
data.value: Strip GPS metadata on imported copy

data.name: ImportInboxMoveOriginalsHint
data.value: Copy keeps the source files untouched. Move is faster when this inbox is already your temporary intake folder.

data.name: ImportInboxChooseDestinationThenImport
data.value: Choose a destination, then import included files.

data.name: ImportInboxReadyStatus
data.value: Ready. Add files or a folder to stage imports.

data.name: ImportInboxCouldNotAddSource
data.value: Could not add that import source.

data.name: ImportInboxAddFolderBeforeRefresh
data.value: Add files or a folder before refreshing the import inbox.

data.name: ImportInboxStagedResultFormat
data.value: Staged {0} file{1}. {2} inbox duplicate{3}, {4} destination duplicate{5}.

data.name: ImportInboxDestinationSelected
data.value: Destination selected. Add files or a folder to stage imports.

data.name: ImportInboxAppliedMetadata
data.value: Applied selected metadata to included inbox files.

data.name: ImportInboxSelectBeforeRecycling
data.value: Select one or more staged files before recycling.

data.name: ImportInboxRecycledFormat
data.value: Moved {0} staged file{1} to Recycle Bin.

data.name: ImportInboxRecycledPartialFormat
data.value: Moved {0} staged file{1} to Recycle Bin. {2} failed.

data.name: ImportInboxChooseDestinationBeforeImporting
data.value: Choose a destination folder before importing.

data.name: ImportInboxCheckBeforeImporting
data.value: Check at least one staged file before importing.

data.name: ImportInboxAddFilesBegin
data.value: Add files or a folder to begin staging imports.

data.name: ImportInboxIncludedSummaryFormat
data.value: {0} of {1} staged file{2} included. Destination duplicates are skipped by default.

data.name: ExportPreviewSubtitleGeneric
data.value: Preview compression settings against the displayed bitmap before writing a copy.

data.name: ExportPreviewSubtitleFormat
data.value: Preview compression settings for {0} before writing a copy.

data.name: ExportPreviewChooseDifferentFilename
data.value: Choose a different filename for the exported copy.

data.name: ExportPreviewSettingsChanged
data.value: Settings changed. Build a new preview before saving.

data.name: ExportPreviewPresetReady
data.value: Preset ready. Build a preview to inspect pixels, size, and warnings.

data.name: FileHealthScanSubtitle
data.value: Find bad extensions, broken images, zero-byte files, and temporary artifacts locally.

data.name: FileHealthScanEmptyDescription
data.value: Review each finding before renaming an extension or moving a file into app-local quarantine.

data.name: FileHealthScanHelpDefault
data.value: Rename only changes the extension. Quarantine moves the file to app-local recovery storage.

data.name: FileHealthScanReadyStatus
data.value: Ready. Add one or more folders to scan.

data.name: FileHealthScanAddFolderBeforeScanning
data.value: Add at least one folder before scanning.

data.name: FileHealthScanScanningStatus
data.value: Scanning selected folders for file health issues...

data.name: FileHealthScanFailedSuffixFormat
data.value: {0} file or folder issue{1} was skipped.

data.name: FileHealthScanMarkedReviewed
data.value: Finding marked reviewed for this session.

data.name: FileHealthScanDetectedRenameHelpFormat
data.value: Detected {0}; Rename extension will move this file to {1}.

data.name: FileHealthScanNoRenameHelp
data.value: Quarantine moves the file to app-local recovery storage. Mark reviewed hides this finding for the current window.

data.name: SemanticSearchIndexedFoldersHint
data.value: Indexing is explicit and local. The current MVP stores derived vectors in app-local SQLite and never contacts a network service.

data.name: SemanticSearchEmptyState
data.value: Build an index, then search for words from filenames, sidecar tags, formats, or orientation hints.

data.name: SemanticSearchAddFolderBeforeIndexing
data.value: Add at least one folder before indexing.

data.name: SemanticSearchIndexedResultFormat
data.value: Indexed {0} of {1} cataloged asset{2}. {3} file{4} skipped.

data.name: SemanticSearchIndexingCanceled
data.value: Indexing canceled; previous semantic index remains usable.

data.name: SemanticSearchIndexDeleted
data.value: Deleted the local semantic search index.

data.name: SemanticSearchFilterSet
data.value: Search filter set to the selected root.

data.name: SemanticSearchEnterQuery
data.value: Enter a local search query first.

data.name: SemanticSearchSelectBeforeOpening
data.value: Select a search result before opening.

data.name: SemanticSearchResultNoLongerExists
data.value: The selected result no longer exists.

data.name: SemanticSearchSelectBeforeRevealing
data.value: Select a search result before revealing it.

data.name: SemanticSearchStorageUnavailable
data.value: Semantic search storage is unavailable for this session.

data.name: TagGraphSubtitle
data.value: Private local namespaces, aliases, parents, and XMP sidecar import/export.

data.name: TagGraphNoImageHint
data.value: Open an image first to import or export its XMP sidecar tags.

data.name: TagGraphTagInputHint
data.value: One tag per line, or separate tags with commas. Aliases are resolved on export.

data.name: TagGraphNamespacesHint
data.value: Prefixes keep large tag sets readable, such as person:alice or place:seattle.

data.name: TagGraphAliasHint
data.value: Use aliases for equivalent tags. Example: nyc -> place:new-york.

data.name: TagGraphParentHint
data.value: Use parents to make searches broader. Example: person:alice -> people.

data.name: TagGraphReadyStatus
data.value: Ready. Tag relationships stay local on this device.

data.name: TagGraphOpenImageBeforeImporting
data.value: Open an image before importing sidecar tags.

data.name: TagGraphOpenImageBeforeExporting
data.value: Open an image before exporting sidecar tags.

data.name: TagGraphNoNamespaceOrAlias
data.value: No namespace or alias rules yet.

data.name: TagGraphEnterAtLeastOneTag
data.value: Enter at least one tag to preview.

data.name: ReferenceBoardSubtitle
data.value: Local canvas for arranging references, notes, and exportable groups.

data.name: ReferenceBoardEmptyDescription
data.value: Use Add images, drop files from Explorer, add note cards, or draw group frames. Nothing leaves this device.

data.name: ReferenceBoardReadyStatus
data.value: Ready. Drop supported files or add board elements.

data.name: ReferenceBoardAddedAndSkippedFormat
data.value: Added {0} reference{1}. Skipped {2} unsupported or unreadable file{3}.

data.name: ReferenceBoardAddedGroup
data.value: Added group frame. Drag the header to move it or use the corner handle to resize.

data.name: ReferenceBoardAddBeforeExporting
data.value: Add at least one image, note, or group before exporting.

data.name: ReferenceBoardNoVisibleContent
data.value: There is no visible board content to export.

data.name: MainAnimWorkbenchEmpty
data.value: Open an animated GIF, APNG, or WebP to inspect frames.

data.name: MainArchiveRtlHint
data.value: For manga-style books, the left edge and Left Arrow advance; the right edge goes back.

data.name: MainArchiveLtrHint
data.value: For western books, the right edge and Right Arrow advance; the left edge goes back.

data.name: MainArchiveCleanScansHint
data.value: Preview-only: converts archive pages to high-contrast grayscale. The archive file is not changed.

data.name: MainArchiveSpreadHintRtl
data.value: Pairs pages side by side for reading, with the next page on the left in right-to-left mode.

data.name: MainArchiveSpreadHintLtr
data.value: Pairs pages side by side for reading, keeping explicit covers as single pages.

data.name: MainFirstRunPrivacyOn
data.value: Automatic update checks are enabled. Image files stay local; release checks only contact GitHub.

data.name: MainFirstRunPrivacyOff
data.value: No telemetry and no image uploads. Automatic update checks are off until you enable them.

data.name: MainFirstRunRecovery
data.value: Settings manages privacy and viewer defaults. Diagnostics shows codec, OCR, log, and storage status.

data.name: MainOverlayExitNoHotkey
data.value: Use Exit overlay, the context menu, or the taskbar close command.

data.name: MainOverlayStatusIdle
data.value: Pin the current image above other windows for tracing or visual comparison.

data.name: MainOverlayStatusNoHotkey
data.value: Overlay is pinned. Click-through is disabled because the global exit hotkey could not register.

data.name: MainCompareStatusCanStart
data.value: Compare the current image with the next file, another local file, or a duplicate cleanup pair.

data.name: MainCompareStatusNeedTwo
data.value: Open at least two images in a folder, or choose another local file to compare.

data.name: MainLoadErrorGhostscriptMessage
data.value: This file type depends on Ghostscript for document and Adobe Illustrator previews. Images can use a bundled runtime, IMAGES_GHOSTSCRIPT_DIR, or an installed Ghostscript copy.

data.name: MainLoadErrorGhostscriptHelp
data.value: Open codec details to see the active runtime status and copy a support report.

data.name: MainLoadErrorNotFoundMessage
data.value: This file no longer exists. It may have been moved, renamed, or deleted.

data.name: MainLoadErrorNotFoundHelp
data.value: Navigate to another image or open a new file.

data.name: MainLoadErrorAccessMessage
data.value: You do not have permission to read this file.

data.name: MainLoadErrorAccessHelp
data.value: Check the file's security properties in Explorer, or try running Images as Administrator.

data.name: MainLoadErrorOomMessage
data.value: This image is too large to fit in available memory.

data.name: MainLoadErrorOomHelp
data.value: Close other applications to free memory, or try reopening the file.

data.name: MainLoadErrorDecodeHelp
data.value: Try another file, reveal the file in Explorer, or reload after another app finishes writing it.

data.name: MainLoadErrorDecodeMessage
data.value: This file could not be decoded. It may be corrupt or use a format feature Images doesn't support.

data.name: MainLoadErrorStoreExtensionMessage
data.value: {0} decoding needs the {1} from the Microsoft Store.

data.name: MainLoadErrorStoreExtensionHelp
data.value: Install the extension, then reload this file. The built-in fallback decoder could not handle this file either.

data.name: MainLoadErrorJxlMessage
data.value: JPEG XL decoding is not available on this version of Windows.

data.name: MainLoadErrorJxlHelp
data.value: JPEG XL support requires Windows 11 24H2 or later. Update Windows or convert the file to PNG or WebP first.

data.name: MainDropAcceptedMessage
data.value: Images will load this file and scan the folder for navigation.

data.name: MainInspectorActiveHelp
data.value: Sampling is active. Shift-drag measures a rectangle.

data.name: MainInspectorInactiveHelp
data.value: Turn on Inspector to read pixel color and coordinates.

data.name: MainInspectorReady
data.value: Move over the image to sample pixels. Click to hold a sample; Ctrl+click copies it. Shift-drag measures.

data.name: MainInspectorDefault
data.value: Turn on Inspector to sample pixel color, coordinates, and dimensions.

data.name: MainInspectorMoveToSample
data.value: Move over the image to sample pixels.

data.name: MainSelectActiveHelp
data.value: Drag a rectangle on the image. Copy places the selected pixels on the clipboard; Esc cancels.

data.name: MainSelectInactiveHelp
data.value: Select pixels without changing the source file.

data.name: MainSelectReady
data.value: Selection mode is ready. Drag on the image to choose pixels to copy.

data.name: MainSelectPaused
data.value: Selection is paused. Toggle it on to drag a pixel selection.

data.name: MainSelectOpen
data.value: Open an image to select pixels.

data.name: MainCropActiveHelp
data.value: Freehand crop is active. Drag a rectangle on the image. Enter overwrites the file; Esc cancels.

data.name: MainCropInactiveHelp
data.value: Crop starts automatically for normal images; toggle it off when you need canvas pan-only control.

data.name: MainCropReady
data.value: Freehand crop is ready. Drag on the image to choose a crop. Enter or Apply overwrites the file.

data.name: MainCropPaused
data.value: Crop is paused. Toggle it on to drag a crop that overwrites the file.

data.name: MainCropOpen
data.value: Open an image to start freehand crop mode.

data.name: MainCropUnavailable
data.value: Crop is available only for flat raster image files like JPEG, PNG, WebP, TIFF, GIF, BMP, HEIC/AVIF/JXL, and similar bitmap formats.

data.name: MainCropCustomHelp
data.value: Enter positive whole numbers for custom width and height.

data.name: MainCropCustomAspectError
data.value: Enter a positive custom aspect ratio before dragging.

data.name: MainExposureActiveHelp
data.value: Paint directly on the image. Enter adds strokes to edit history; Esc cancels.

data.name: MainExposureInactiveHelp
data.value: Non-destructive dodge and burn strokes for Save a copy exports.

data.name: MainExposureActiveStatus
data.value: Paint on the image. Enter adds strokes to edit history; Esc cancels.

data.name: MainExposureInactiveStatus
data.value: Turn on exposure brush, then paint dodge or burn strokes without changing the source file.

data.name: MainExposureBurnActive
data.value: Burn mode selected. Paint to darken local areas.

data.name: MainExposureBurnInactive
data.value: Burn mode selected. Turn on exposure brush to paint.

data.name: MainExposureDodgeActive
data.value: Dodge mode selected. Paint to brighten local areas.

data.name: MainExposureDodgeInactive
data.value: Dodge mode selected. Turn on exposure brush to paint.

data.name: MainRedEyeActiveHelp
data.value: Click or paint over red pupils. Enter applies the correction; Esc cancels.

data.name: MainRedEyeInactiveHelp
data.value: Non-destructive red-eye correction for Save a copy exports.

data.name: MainRedEyeActiveStatus
data.value: Click or drag over red pupils. Enter adds corrections to edit history; Esc cancels.

data.name: MainRedEyeInactiveStatus
data.value: Turn on red-eye correction, then mark red pupils without changing the source file.

data.name: MainRetouchActiveHelp
data.value: Alt-click picks a source. Drag paints clone or healing strokes.

data.name: MainRetouchInactiveHelp
data.value: Non-destructive clone stamp and healing brush for Save a copy exports.

data.name: MainRetouchActiveWithSource
data.value: Paint over the target area. Alt-click picks a new source; Enter applies.

data.name: MainRetouchActiveNoSource
data.value: Alt-click or click once to pick a source, then paint the target area.

data.name: MainRetouchInactiveStatus
data.value: Turn on retouch, pick a source, then paint clone or healing strokes.

data.name: MainRetouchSourceClearedStatus
data.value: Source cleared. Alt-click or click once to pick a new source.

data.name: MainRetouchHealActive
data.value: Healing brush selected. Alt-click a clean source, then paint the target.

data.name: MainRetouchHealInactive
data.value: Healing brush selected. Turn on retouch to paint.

data.name: MainRetouchCloneActive
data.value: Clone stamp selected. Alt-click a source, then paint the target.

data.name: MainRetouchCloneInactive
data.value: Clone stamp selected. Turn on retouch to paint.

data.name: MainInpaintActiveWithMask
data.value: Paint to add mask regions. Enter or Apply runs AI repair; Esc cancels.

data.name: MainInpaintActiveNoMask
data.value: Paint over areas to repair. The AI model fills painted regions from surrounding content.

data.name: MainExtensionUnlockedHelp
data.value: Extension changes rename the file but do not convert image format.

data.name: MainExtensionLockedHelp
data.value: Unlock only if you need to rename the file extension.

data.name: MainRenameUndoFailed
data.value: Cannot undo — file no longer exists at that path

data.name: MainGalleryFilterTooltip
data.value: Filter by name/path or use smart filters such as format:png, orientation:landscape, size:large, date:week, duplicate:yes, rating:5, tag:portrait, or palette:blue.

data.name: MainSecondaryThumbnailFailure
data.value: Some thumbnails could not be shown

data.name: MainSecondaryFileGoneDetail
data.value: The file may have been moved, renamed, deleted, or disconnected.

data.name: MainSecondaryRecentFolderRemovedDetail
data.value: It was removed from the list because the folder no longer exists.

data.name: MainSecondaryNoSupportedImages
data.value: No supported images in this folder

data.name: MainSecondaryFolderUnreachableDetail
data.value: Check permissions or reconnect the drive, then try again.

data.name: MainSecondaryArchiveGoneDetail
data.value: It was removed from book history because the file no longer exists.

data.name: MainSecondaryClipboardNotSupportedDetail
data.value: The clipboard contains files, but none are formats Images can open.

data.name: MainSecondaryClipboardNoImageDetail
data.value: Copy an image, screenshot, or supported image file, then paste again.

data.name: MainSecondaryClipboardUnreadable
data.value: Clipboard image could not be read

data.name: MainSecondaryClipboardUnreadableDetail
data.value: Try copying the image again from the source app.

data.name: MainSecondaryClipboardSaveFailed
data.value: Clipboard paste could not be saved

data.name: MainSecondaryClipboardSaveFailedDetail
data.value: Images could not create a temporary local copy. Open Diagnostics to inspect storage.

data.name: MainSecondaryEmailRetentionDetail
data.value: Draft attachment copies are stored locally and pruned after 7 days.

data.name: MainSecondaryTransferSourceDetail
data.value: The image could not be copied or moved because it was removed from disk.

data.name: MainSecondaryTransferFolderGoneDetail
data.value: It was removed from the recent destination list because the folder no longer exists.

data.name: MainSecondaryTransferNotSupportedDetail
data.value: Only files Images can open can be copied or moved from this viewer.

data.name: MainToastGalleryOpenFolder
data.value: Open a folder with images to use Gallery

data.name: MainToastAdjustmentUnavailable
data.value: Adjustment failed: image is no longer available

data.name: MainToastEffectsUnavailable
data.value: Effects failed: image is no longer available

data.name: MainToastAnnotationsUnavailable
data.value: Annotations failed: image is no longer available

data.name: MainToastPerspectiveUnavailable
data.value: Perspective failed: image is no longer available

data.name: MainToastExposureBrushAdded
data.value: Exposure brush added to edit history

data.name: MainToastRedEyeAdded
data.value: Red-eye correction added to edit history

data.name: MainToastNoLamaModel
data.value: No LaMa model imported — open Model Manager first

data.name: MainToastAiRepaintMode
data.value: AI repair mode — paint areas to fill

data.name: MainToastNoGpsData
data.value: No GPS data found in this file

data.name: MainToastImageTooLarge
data.value: Image too large for available memory

data.name: MainToastStoreExtensionNeeded
data.value: {0} needs a codec extension from the Microsoft Store

data.name: MainToastStoreExtensionOpenFailed
data.value: Could not open Microsoft Store for {0}

data.name: MainToastJxlNeedsUpdate
data.value: JPEG XL needs Windows 11 24H2 or later

data.name: MainToastFilenameInvalid
data.value: Filename needs at least one valid character

data.name: MainToastAutoEnhanceAdded
data.value: Auto Enhance added to edit history

data.name: MainToastPerspectiveAdded
data.value: Perspective correction added to edit history

data.name: MainComparePathInvalid
data.value: The selected compare path is not valid.

data.name: MainCompareFileGone
data.value: The selected compare file no longer exists.

data.name: MainCompareSameFile
data.value: Choose a different image for the B side.

data.name: MainChooseDifferentFilename
data.value: Choose a different filename for the copy

data.name: AboutNetworkActivityEmpty
data.value: No network activity recorded. Images only connects to check for updates.

data.name: AboutNetworkActivityCopyAutomationName
data.value: Copy network activity log to clipboard

data.name: AboutNetworkActivityCopied
data.value: Network activity log copied to clipboard.

data.name: AboutNetworkActivityCleared
data.value: Network activity log cleared from this device.

data.name: ListenMode_Tooltip
data.value: Listen mode active on port {0}. Send this session token as the first line, then UTF-8 file paths to tcp://127.0.0.1:{0}. Token: {1}

data.name: ListenMode_StartedToast
data.value: Listen mode active on port {0}. Use the toolbar tooltip for the session token.

data.name: MainFormatMismatch
data.value: File content is {0} but extension is {1} — expected {2}

data.name: MainToastMotionVideoFailed
data.value: Could not extract the embedded motion video

data.name: MainToastCompanionVideoFailed
data.value: Could not open the companion video file

data.name: MainToastMetadataStripFailed
data.value: Could not strip {0}. Open Diagnostics for technical details.

data.name: AutomationAboutWindowSaveSystemInfoToATextFile
data.value: Save system info to a text file

data.name: AutomationAboutWindowExportARedactedSupportBundleForBugReports
data.value: Export a redacted support bundle for bug reports

data.name: AutomationMainWindowOpenMicrosoftStoreToInstallCodecExtension
data.value: Open Microsoft Store to install codec extension

data.name: AutomationMainWindowSortGalleryByExplorerLikeName
data.value: Sort gallery by Explorer-like name order

data.name: AutomationMainWindowSortGalleryByNewestModifiedDate
data.value: Sort gallery by newest modified date

data.name: AutomationMainWindowSortGalleryByLargestFileSize
data.value: Sort gallery by largest file size

data.name: AutomationMainWindowFilterGalleryToRecentlyModifiedImages
data.value: Filter gallery to recently modified images

data.name: AutomationMainWindowApplyLocalExposureBrushToEditHistory
data.value: Apply local exposure brush to edit history

data.name: AutomationMainWindowApplyRedEyeCorrectionToEditHistory
data.value: Apply red-eye correction to edit history

data.name: MainUiDropAnImageHereChooseOneFromDiskOr
data.value: Drop an image here, choose one from disk, or paste from the clipboard.

data.name: MainUiTipArrowKeysBrowseTheFolderEnterCommitsA
data.value: Tip: arrow keys browse the folder, Enter commits a rename.

data.name: MainUiDragToJumpToAnotherPageInTheCurrent
data.value: Drag to jump to another page in the current document or archive.

data.name: MainUiScrollToZoomDragToPanDoubleClickTo
data.value: Scroll to zoom · drag to pan · double-click to fit

data.name: MainUiPreviousNextImageOrBookPage
data.value: Previous / next image or book page

data.name: MainUiFirstLastImageOrBookPage
data.value: First / last image or book page

data.name: MainUiNextPreviousImageOrBookPage
data.value: Next / previous image or book page

data.name: MainUiLoupeMagnifyPixelsUnderTheCursor
data.value: Loupe — magnify pixels under the cursor

data.name: MainUiLoupeCenteredLensPanToMove
data.value: Loupe — centered lens, pan to move

data.name: MainUiRevertRenameDismissOverlayExitFullscreen
data.value: Revert rename / dismiss overlay / exit fullscreen

data.name: MainUiClickToPauseResumeEscapeToStop
data.value: Click to pause/resume, Escape to stop

data.name: MainUiOpenOrDropASupportedFileToStartViewing
data.value: Open or drop a supported file to start viewing.

data.name: MainUiOpenTheReleasePageWhenYouAreReadyTo
data.value: Open the release page when you are ready to install it.

data.name: MainUiChangingTheExtensionOnlyRenamesTheFileUseA
data.value: Changing the extension only renames the file. Use a supported Images format; this will not convert the image.

data.name: MainUiYourUndoListWillAppearHere
data.value: Your undo list will appear here.

data.name: MainUiManagePrivateLocalTagNamespacesAliasesParentsAndXMP
data.value: Manage private local tag namespaces, aliases, parents, and XMP sidecar tag export.

data.name: MainUiBuildInspectableJSONActionsManageLocalModelFilesAnd
data.value: Build inspectable JSON actions, manage local model files, and search the current folder through the local semantic index.

data.name: MainUiFindDuplicateImagesBadExtensionsBrokenFilesAndTemporary
data.value: Find duplicate images, bad extensions, broken files, and temporary artifacts in local folders.

data.name: MainUiUseCrispScalingForPixelArtInspection
data.value: Use crisp scaling for pixel-art inspection.

data.name: AboutUiSavesAZIPWithSystemInfoCodecReportRecent
data.value: Saves a ZIP with system info, codec report, recent logs, crash log, recovery records, and redacted settings. No image bytes or private paths.

data.name: MainToastOpenDefaultFailed
data.value: Could not open this file in its default app

data.name: MainToastDeleteFailed
data.value: Could not move this file to the Recycle Bin

data.name: MainToastFrameDragFailed
data.value: Could not prepare the frame for dragging

data.name: MainToastAutoEnhanceFailed
data.value: Auto enhance could not be added

data.name: MainToastPerspectiveFailed
data.value: Perspective correction could not be added

data.name: MainToastRevealFailed
data.value: Could not reveal this file in Explorer

data.name: MainToastFolderPickerFailed
data.value: Could not open the folder picker

data.name: MainToastGpsStripFailed
data.value: Could not remove GPS location data
